Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order As To Defendant Nadezda Usupova
Off Calendar Nov-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Paymon Hifai, 925-943-6570 of the Horner Law Group, P.C., appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff Anchorage Holdings, L.P.
Lawrences Fasano, 415-432-4401 of Fasano Law Office appearing via Zoom for Defendants Alexander and Nadezda Usupova.
Paul Silver, specially appearing via Zoom for William Rauch of Willima Rauch Law, 415-753-6618 for Defendant Subway Real Estate Corporation.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF ANCHORAGE HOLDINGS, LP'S NOTICE OF APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AS TO DEFENDANT NADEZDA USUPOVA
is GRANTED in part and DENIED without prejudice in PART. Motion is granted in the amount of $119,436.14 (base rent, additional rent and late charges through February 2021). Motion is otherwise denied without prejudice to be brought again with supporting evidence regarding mitigation of damages since February 17, 2021 and support for attorney's fees claim. To the extent Defendant presents a claim of exemption in opposition to this motion, the claim as denied as not supported by evidence. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF ANCHORAGE HOLDINGS, LP'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER USUPOVA is GRANTED in part and DENIED without prejudice in PART. Motion is granted in the amount of $119,436.14 (base rent, additional rent and late charges through February 2021). Motion is otherwise denied without prejudice to be brought again with supporting evidence regarding mitigation of damages since February 17, 2021 and support for attorney's fees claim. To the extent Defendant presents a claim of exemption in opposition to this motion, the claim as denied as not supported by evidence. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
